concept: Sinal de controle Sentinel: um nó diamantado projeta quatro feixes, monta uma malha de cantos, fecha um perímetro octogonal, confirma a posse com um tick dourado e recolhe a energia.
selectionRationale: Entrega nova de feedback de arena, distinta de rally beacon, boundary lock, lane wayfinder, hex ownership pulse, capture pulse, zone gate scan e control pulse por usar feixes diagonais e uma malha que se transforma em perímetro octogonal.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 4x4 sprite sheet for a Bomba PvP arena-feedback VFX. Primary request: create a coherent sixteen-frame animation of a sentinel lattice control signal, arranged as a clean 4x4 grid in row-major order. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor, or reflections. Subject: a small diamond-shaped arena node emits four thin cyan beams toward the cardinal diagonals, assembling a square lattice of glowing corner brackets; the brackets pulse in sequence, lock into a crisp octagonal perimeter, flash a gold ownership tick, then retract into the node. Style/medium: polished high-contrast game VFX, crisp cel-shaded 2.5D illustration, readable at small runtime size, consistent scale and lighting across all frames. Composition/framing: one centered effect per cell, generous padding, no overlap between cells, no clipping. Lighting/mood: tactical arena control feedback, precise and legible. Color palette: electric cyan, deep blue, white highlights, a small warm-gold confirmation accent. Constraints: sixteen distinct sequential poses; frame 00 a faint node spark, frames 01-04 beams extend, frames 05-08 lattice corners pulse clockwise, frames 09-12 octagonal perimeter locks, frames 13-15 gold tick and retract; do not use #00ff00 in the subject. Avoid: text, UI, characters, weapons, logos, generic circular rings, explosions, fire, smoke clouds, water, extra objects, gradients or variation in the chroma-key background, watermark.

source.note: source-upscaled-2048.png é derivado por Lanczos e não uma fonte nativa 2048px

pipeline.alphaPreparation: remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key border, soft-matte, despill e edge-contract 1
pipeline.frameExtraction: ImageMagick: source-grid-1248 dividido em 16 células 232px, recortadas com margem interna de 40px, redimensionadas para 240px e centralizadas em 312px

animation.alpha: RGBA; fundo chroma-key removido; borda interna transparente

delegation.request: Conferir grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas sem tocar em outros paths, instalar ou fazer git.
delegation.result: Invocação feita no diretório exclusivo; o wrapper encerrou com falha após reportar o escopo, sem gerar arquivos e sem produzir validação utilizável.
delegation.imagine: Não disponível no ambiente Grok; a fonte foi criada pelo image_gen integrado.
delegation.fallback: Extração, organização e validação concluídas localmente com ImageMagick.

validation.commandResult: frames=16 empty=0 edgeHits=0 badDims=0 sourceSheet=1248x1248 runtimeSheet=1024x1024 contactSheet=1024x1024 gifFrames=16 timingCentiseconds=6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6
